Jeff Johnson, 415.404.6707 Defendant on his own behalf.

MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT JEFF JOHNSTON'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND.

No appearances are made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Matter is transferred to be heard in department 501 on October 28, 2021 at 9:30 a.m. That department handles all breach of lease cases per SF Local Rule 8.10A1.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/EPS)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-01-2021 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-03-2021 Continued To Jul-21-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Jun-03-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for a specially set Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Jeff Johnston, an individual, dba Jeff Johnston Tax Group.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Linda Forster, CSR #13286. Email: lforster@ssftc.org.

Marina Franco, Esq. appeared for plaintiff the Golden Pacific Properties LLC, a California limited liability company.
Stephen Wong, Property Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Ms. Franco and Mr. Wong appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Jeff Johnston, an individual, dba Jeff Johnston Tax Group.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract was filed on January 14, 2021, and personally served on defendant Jeff Johnston, an individual, dba Jeff Johnston Tax Group, on February 8, 2021.
Default as to defendant Jeff Johnston, an individual, dba Jeff Johnston Tax Group, was entered on March 12, 2021.
DOE defendants were dismissed on April 6, 2021.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Golden Pacific Properties LLC, a California limited liability company, and against the defaulted defendant Jeff Johnston, an individual, dba Jeff Johnston Tax Group, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $44,000.00.
Attorney Fees - $2,493.75.
Costs - $590.00.

Total - $47,083.75.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
